headline: Veralto (VLTO) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: With me today are Jennifer Honeycutt, our President and Chief Executive Officer; and Sameer Ralhan, our Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.  During the year, we replicated and regionalized more than a dozen production lines into existing locations to drive flexibility across our footprint and improve our ability to serve customers more efficiently.

headline: Rollins Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: ROL's Q1 revenues are expected to grow, driven by Orkin demand, digital tools and pricing strategies, but the model signals no clear beat.
